This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] div role is caption (in div with table role)
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"
[FAIL] orphan p role is caption
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"

  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"
[FAIL] orphan span role is cell

[FAIL] span role is columnheader (in div with row role, in div with rowgroup role, in div with table role)
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"
[FAIL] div role is row (in div with rowgroup role, in div with table role)
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"
[FAIL] div role is rowgroup (in div with table role)
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"
[FAIL] role is rowheader (in div with row role, in div with rowgroup role, in div with table role)
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"
[FAIL] div role is table
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"
